title: Search Settings
description: Configure how Octara Search retrieves and displays your results.

off.name: Off
off.description: No filtering. Shows all results as they are.

moderate.name: Moderate
moderate.description: Blurs sensitive content. You can choose to view specific results.

strict.name: Strict
strict.description: Maximum safety. Completely hides results flagged as NSFW.

new_tab.title: Open results in new tab
new_tab.description: Keep your search session active while browsing.

suggestions.title: Search suggestions
suggestions.description: Show predictive queries as you type.
